description_long: This motorcycle features a sleek, aerodynamic design with sharp, angular bodywork and a sporty profile. The exterior is predominantly a mix of metallic black and blue with striking geometric patterns, giving it a futuristic and aggressive appearance. The front fairing is wide and pointed, with integrated headlight elements and a streamlined windshield. The side views reveal a compact, high-performance frame, a sculpted fuel tank, and a raised rear seat with a pronounced tail section. The wheels are large and robust, with visible disc brakes and a chain drive system. The overall build suggests a high-speed, urban sport bike designed for agility and performance.
description: A futuristic, angular sport motorcycle with black and blue geometric patterns, streamlined fairings, and a raised rear seat. Its design emphasizes speed and agility for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, pointed fairing, integrated headlight, and aerodynamic windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the sculpted fuel tank, exposed engine, and aggressive tail section.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the raised tail, rear wheel, and the symmetry of the bodywork.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the chain drive, exhaust, and detailed fairing contours.
